title: Breath of the Wild (BOTW) Cosmetics
description: Custom model resource pack adding items from the Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild!
body:
BOTW custom items! Relive Link's journey in the open world of ~~Hyrule~~ Minecraft!

Check the gallery for the models!

Version 1.0 was made for vanilla custom models, and should work for 1.14-1.21.1. However, it is NOT survival friendly, the items must be accessed through commands (below). Version 1.1 was made with the item components system, and will work for 1.21.2+. It still may need commands to access the custom items (below x2). It is only survival friendly for 1.21.5, due to the code only being added in this version. It is unknown if this will work for mods such as Optifine or CIT Resewn, I did not make these with those mods in mind.

**1.14-1.21.1 Item Model Format: Item (#) - Model**

/give @p item[custom_model_data:#)
- netherite sword (1) - Master Sword
- shield (1) - Hylian Shield
- obsidian (1) - Shiekah Slate
- _Silent Princess and individual Shiekah Slate models not present_

**1.21.5 Survival-Friendly Renaming Rename the LISTED ITEM(S) to the specified name!**
- any sword: The Master Sword
- shield: Hylian Shield
- blue orchid: Silent Princess
- light blue bundle: Shiekah Slate (filling the bundle will change the model!)

- nether brick: ANY of the following options
- Shiekah Slate (will be all the rotating screens)
- Shiekah Slate Blank
- Shiekah Slate Inventory
- Shiekah Slate Map
- Shiekah Slate Circle Bomb
- Shiekah Slate Square Bomb
- Shiekah Slate Magnesis
- Shiekah Slate Stasis
- Shiekah Slate Cryonosis
- Shiekah Slate Camera

**1.21.2+ Item Components:**
/give @p ANY_ITEM_YOU_WANT[item_model:"becca:json_filename"]
- botw_hylianshield
- botw_mastersword
- botw_silent_princess
- botw_shiekahslate
- botw_shiekahslate_blank
- botw_shiekahslate_inventory
- botw_shiekahslate_map
- botw_shiekahslate_circlebomb
- botw_shiekahslate_squarebomb
- botw_shiekahslate_magnesis
- botw_shiekahslate_stasis
- botw_shiekahslate_cryo
- botw_shiekahslate_camera
